summary: Comprehensive CRM system testing completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (16/16 tests passed). Frontend testing shows excellent functionality with admin/customer role-based access, navigation, authentication, and UI components working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlays occasionally block logout button clicks, requiring force click or modal closure first

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with 8 stat cards for admin, 3 for customer
Navigation to all pages: Customers, Inquiries, Follow-ups, Quotations, Inventory, Tickets, GST Settings, Users
Role-based access control enforced (customers blocked from admin pages)
Customer Help Center and My Quotations access
Backend APIs: All 16 endpoints tested successfully
PDF quotation generation working (2417 bytes generated)
CRUD operations for customers, inquiries, follow-ups, quotations, inventory, tickets
GST rates management (4 default rates seeded)
Dashboard stats and recent data display
